info.title: Gigs Core API
info.description: OpenAPI spec for Gigs Core API endpoints

200.description: Returns the add-on object if it exists.

patch.description: Updates an add-on's name and description.

post.description: Creates a new device with the given parameters.

200.description: Returns the device object if it exists.

delete.description: Retrieves the details of an existing device and deletes it.

patch.description: Updates the given properties of an existing device.

200.description: Returns a list of device model brands.
Returns a list of device models.
Returns a list of device models.
Returns the device model object if it exists.

post.description: Looks up network availability information based on geographic coordinates (latitude/longitude) or address. Returns network availability data only for US locations.

200.description: Returns the network availability data with location.
Returns a list of plan objects.
Returns the plan if it exists.

patch.description: Updates the specified plan by setting the values of the parameters passed.

200.description: Returns a list of document objects.
Returns the plan document if it exists.

get.description: Returns a list of portings. The portings returned are sorted by creation date, with the most recently created portings appearing first.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: The status to filter the portings by.

parameters.name: subscription
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the subscription to be filtered by.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the user to be filtered by.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: A cursor for use in pagination. The after parameter takes an object ID that defines the position in the list, only items immediately following the item with that ID will be returned.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: A cursor for use in pagination. The before parameter takes an object ID that defines the position in the list, only items immediately preceding the item with that ID will be returned.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The limit of items to be returned in the list, between 0 and 200.

200.description: Returns a dictionary with an items property that contains an array of portings.

post.description: Creates a new porting. It will be created in draft status and can be later used to create an order or subscription for the same provider.
Searches for existing portings matching the given parameters.

200.description: Returns a list of portings matching the search criteria.

get.description: Retrieves the details of an existing porting.

delete.description: Deletes a porting that is in the draft state.

patch.description: Updates a porting with the given parameters. Depending on the status of the porting, some fields may not be updated anymore.

post.description: Cancels a porting. A porting can be cancelled if it is in the pending, declined or informationRequired state, or in the requested state and scheduled for a future date.

get.description: Returns a list of service providers. It is recommended that callers provide either a recipient provider or country to filter for relevant service providers.

parameters.name: recipientProvider
parameters.description: Only return service providers that have the given network provider as supported porting recipient.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Only return service providers for the given country represented by the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.

200.description: Returns a dictionary with an items property that contains an array of service providers.

get.description: Retrieves the details of a service provider.

200.description: Returns the service provider object if it exists.

parameters.name: subscription
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the subscription to be filtered by.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of statuses to filter the port outs by.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: A cursor for use in pagination.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: A cursor for use in pagination.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The limit of items to be returned in the list.

200.description: Returns a dictionary with an items property that contains an array of port outs.

post.summary: Simulate port out completion by network provider

parameters.name: organization
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the organization to be filtered by.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: A cursor for use in pagination.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: A cursor for use in pagination.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The limit of items to be returned in the list.

200.description: Returns a dictionary with an items property that contains an array of projects.
Returns the project object if it exists.
Returns the eSimProfile if it exists.

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description: The network provider ID for the sim to be filtered by.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of statuses to filter the sims by.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The type for the sim to be filtered by.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the user to be filtered by.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: A cursor for use in pagination.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: A cursor for use in pagination.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The limit of items to be returned in the list.

200.description: Returns the SIM if it exists.
Returns a list of subscription objects.
Returns the subscription if it exists.

post.summary: Port a phone number into a subscription

200.description: Returns a list of subscription add-ons.

201.description: Returns the newly created subscription add-on.

200.description: Returns the subscription add-on if it exists.
Returns a list of subscription changes.

201.description: Returns the newly created subscription change.

200.description: Returns the subscription change if it exists.
Returns the subscription change after a successful deletion.

project.name: project
project.description: The unique identifier for the project.

addon.name: addon
addon.description: The unique identifier for the add-on.

device.name: device
device.description: The unique identifier for the device.

deviceModel.name: deviceModel
deviceModel.description: The unique identifier for the device model.

plan.name: plan
plan.description: The unique identifier for the plan.

planDocument.name: planDocument
planDocument.description: The unique identifier for the plan document.

porting.name: porting
porting.description: The unique identifier for the porting.

serviceProvider.name: serviceProvider
serviceProvider.description: The unique identifier for the service provider.

portOut.name: portOut
portOut.description: The unique identifier for the port out.

sim.name: sim
sim.description: The unique identifier for the SIM.

subscription.name: subscription

subscriptionAddon.name: subscriptionAddon

subscriptionChange.name: subscriptionChange
subscriptionChange.description: The unique identifier for the subscription change.

name.description: The name of the add-on, meant to be displayable to users.

validity.description: The custom validity for this add-on.

unit.description: The time unit, either day or month.

metadata.description: A set of key-value pairs, to store metadata related to the resource.

imei.description: The IMEI (international mobile equipment identity) of the device.

user.description: Unique user identifier for the device owner.

sims.description: List of identifiers for all SIMs to attach to the device.

name.description: An optional custom name for the device.

metadata.description: A set of key-value pairs, to store metadata related to the resource.

name.description: An optional custom name for the device.

metadata.description: A set of key-value pairs, to store metadata related to the resource.

sims.description: List of identifiers for all SIMs currently attached to the device.

user.description: Unique user identifier for the device owner.

availability.description: A list of availability details for the plans in the project.

plan.description: The unique identifier for the plan.

provider.description: The ID of the network provider supported by this plan.

technologies.description: The technologies supported by the network provider.

location.description: The location for which availability information is provided.

name.description: The plan's name, meant to be displayable to the user.

description.description: The plan's description, meant to be displayable to the user.
description.example: A data plan you will love! Operates in most countries of the world.

image.description: The plan's image, meant to be displayable to the user.

metadata.description: A set of key-value pairs, to store metadata related to the resource.

accountNumber.description: The account number on the donor service provider.

accountPinExists.description: Whether the account PIN has been provided.

address.description: The address of the account holder on the donor service provider.

billingPinExists.description: Whether the billing PIN has been provided.

birthday.description: The birthday of the account holder on the donor service provider.

canceledAt.description: Time when the porting was canceled.

completedAt.description: Time when the porting was completed.

createdAt.description: Time when the porting was created.

declinedAttempts.description: The number of declined porting attempts so far.

declinedCode.description: The code reason for the declined porting.

declinedMessage.description: The reason description for the declined porting.
declinedMessage.example: The phone number has port protection on the provider.

donorProvider.description: The service provider from whom the number is ported.

donorProviderApproval.description: Whether the donor provider has approved or not the porting.

expiredAt.description: Time when the porting was expired.

firstName.description: The first name of the account holder on the donor service provider.

lastDeclinedAt.description: Time when the porting was last declined.

lastName.description: The last name of the account holder on the donor service provider.

lastRequestedAt.description: Time when the porting was last requested.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number to port in E.164 format.

provider.description: The ID of the recipient network provider.

recipientProvider.description: The service provider to whom the number is ported.

required.description: List of fields required for the porting to be processable.

scheduledOn.description: Date when the porting is scheduled to take effect.

status.description: The current status of the porting.

subscription.description: Unique identifier for the porting subscription.

user.description: Unique identifier for the user this porting is for.

moreItemsAfter.description: A unique identifier to be used as after pagination parameter if more items are available sorted after the current batch of items.

moreItemsBefore.description: A unique identifier to be used as before pagination parameter if more items are available sorted before the current batch of items.

accountNumber.description: The account number on the donor service provider.

accountPin.description: The pin for the account on the donor service provider.

address.description: The address of the account holder on the donor service provider.

billingPin.description: The billing pin for the account on the donor service provider.

birthday.description: The birthday of the account holder on the donor service provider.

donorProvider.description: The unique identifier of the donor service provider.

donorProviderApproval.description: Whether the donor provider has approved or not the porting.

firstName.description: The first name of the account holder.

lastName.description: The last name of the account holder.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number to port in E.164 format.

provider.description: The name of the receiving network provider.

scheduledOn.description: The date that the porting is scheduled to take effect.

user.description: The unique identifier for an existing user the porting should be created for.

accountNumber.description: The account number on the donor service provider.

accountPin.description: The pin for the account on the donor service provider.

address.description: The address of the account holder on the donor service provider.

billingPin.description: The billing pin for the account on the donor service provider.

birthday.description: The birthday of the account holder on the donor service provider.

donorProvider.description: The unique identifier of the donor service provider.

donorProviderApproval.description: Whether the donor provider has approved or not the porting.

firstName.description: The first name of the account holder.

lastName.description: The last name of the account holder.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number to port in E.164 format.

provider.description: The ID of the recipient network provider.

scheduledOn.description: Date when the porting is scheduled to take effect.

phoneNumber.description: The E.164-formatted phone number associated with the porting.

id.description: Unique identifier for the service provider.

country.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the service provider.

name.description: The name of the service provider, usually a brand name.

recipientProviders.description: List of network providers IDs that can receive portings from the service provider.

createdAt.description: Time when the SIM was created.

iccid.description: The ICCID (integrated circuit card identifier) associated with the SIM.

provider.description: The ID of the network provider of the SIM.

status.description: The current status of the eSimProfile.

updatedAt.description: Time at which the status was last updated.

activationCode.description: eSIM activation code to download and install the profile in a device.

qrCodeUrl.description: URL of the activation code in QR-Code format.

sim.description: Unique identifier for the SIM this credentials are for.

iccid.description: The ICCID (integrated circuit card identifier) associated with the SIM.

type.description: Optional type of the SIM card, either `eSIM`, `pSIM` or both.

id.description: Unique identifier for the subscription add-on.

status.description: The current status of the subscription add-on.

subscription.description: Unique identifier of the subscription the add-on applies to.

user.description: Unique identifier of the user the subscription add-on belongs to.

subscription.description: Unique identifier of the subscription the add-on applies to.

id.description: Unique identifier for the subscription change.

Forbidden.description: The authenticated user does not have permission to perform this request.

NotFound.description: The requested resource does not exist.

UnprocessableEntity.description: The request was well-formed but could not be processed due to a semantic error.

NotImplemented.description: The requested operation is not implemented.
